response.justification: While Bogdan meets the 15-year experience minimum with strong staff-level engineering credentials, he lacks the AI/ML depth and strategic leadership required for a Principal Engineer focused on AI strategy. His recent exposure to AI infrastructure at Stripe (MCP, agentic workflows) is promising but represents only recent months of work with no demonstrated AI products or platforms. The role requires director-level strategic thinking and AI expertise; this resume shows hands-on technical excellence but insufficient evidence of strategy, customer advisory, or vision-setting at the scale needed.
strengths: 19+ years of professional engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and infrastructure—exceeds the 15-year requirement
Recent AI infrastructure work at Stripe including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks shows emerging AI engagement
Multiple staff-level positions and broad technical versatility demonstrate senior individual contributor capability
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field despite being preferred; background is general CS without specialized AI/ML training
Limited demonstrated AI expertise—only recent MCP work at Stripe; no evidence of AI product development, ML projects, or recognized AI thought leadership
Resume shows hands-on engineering depth but lacks evidence of strategic work, customer advisory, architecture-level AI decisions, or vision-setting needed for director-level AI strategy role
